name: Peacemaker
description: A Dahl pistol that swaps some of the manufacturer's usual smoothness for a Jakobs barrel and a much harder hit. The added recoil makes long-range bursts less dependable, but up close it can outdamage many other Dahl sidearms, especially in the hands of Salvador with I'm Your Huckleberry.
notes: It only appears at green rarity or higher.
